name: Haleiwa Bowls
tagline: North Shore's go-to for acai bowls and espresso drinks in the heart of Haleiwa town.
mustOrder: iced honey latte — pairs perfectly with an acai bowl
cold brew — strong enough for a post-surf revival
parking: Free lot behind Haleiwa town shops on Kamehameha Hwy
talkStory: Started as a tiny acai bowl stand and grew into Haleiwa’s go-to breakfast spot. The bowls use high-quality acai imported from Brazil, blended extra thick — they won’t melt before you finish. The espresso program was added later but is surprisingly legit, with beans from local roasters. The honey latte pairs perfectly with a bowl. Come before 9am to beat the caravan of day-trippers from Honolulu — by mid-morning the line snakes out the door and down the sidewalk.
